---
title: "Bank churn — Baseline ML"
---

## 1) Problem
Common problem address with data science. Based on data behaviour predict what clients have higher probability of stop buying the company services

## 2) Data
Fuente, variables, calidad, posibles sesgos.

## 3) Baseline approach (v0)
- Split
- Modelo base
- Métrica

## 4) Results
Tabla simple de métricas + 2-3 insights.

## 5) Roadmap
- v1: modularización (`src/`, configs)
- v2: tracking + registry (MLflow)
- v3: deploy (API) + CI/CD
